title: Playground Admin Command Table
concept: A dense WordPress-admin-like dashboard for plugin developers where a persistent command/search overlay drives a compact results pane, while saved sites, starts, Site Manager tools, blueprints, and transfer actions remain organized as admin tables.
flows: Search or filter the command table to start Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, or Blueprint gallery flows.
Save the temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with progress, then manage saved browser-backed Playgrounds with rename and delete actions.
Open Site Manager tabs for settings, file browser, Blueprint editing, database tools, logs, Homepage, WP Admin, and additional export actions.
Browse the Blueprint gallery with category filters and run featured templates including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Feed Reader, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog.
Use transfer tools for GitHub import, export to GitHub, download as zip, and local zip import.
featureCoverage: Blueprint gallery with category filters and search
Destructive reset and saved reload behavior
File browser with new file, new folder, upload, browse, and code editor
Blueprint JSON editor with copy link, download bundle, and run controls
Database driver, path, size, download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Logs for Playground, WordPress, and PHP
